parameters.jsCode: let item = items[0].json; if (item.body) { item = item.body; } const errors = []; const required = ["customer_name","email","phone","order_items","subtotal","tax","total","pickup_time"]; for (const field of required) { if (item[field] === undefined || item[field] === null || item[field] === "") { errors.push("Missing: " + field); } } return [{ json: { valid: errors.length === 0, error: errors.join("; ") || undefined, payload: item } }];
